title: Holonomy, the Quantum Adiabatic Theorem, and Berry's Phase
canonical_scope: Primary geometric source for Berry holonomy, line bundles, and the Chern-class interpretation of Hall integers.

section_map.title: Berry Holonomy as Line-Bundle Connection
section_map.summary: Berry's phase is the holonomy of a Hermitian line bundle, and the Hall integers are Chern numbers controlled by eigenvalue degeneracies.
